title: SANDBAG LOCATIONS - 211info
text: BENTON COUNTY SANDBAG LOCATIONS SANDBAG LOCATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides sand and sandbags when there is a risk of flooding. Service details vary by site. 360 SW Avery Avenue Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Residential use only Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week when open (541) 766-6821 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 766-6821 Main phone INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Visit website for service hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Benton County Services: Sandbags/Water Diversion Systems If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
